reforms.description: The PEDIP programme was designed to coordinate financial aid to industry, aiming to modernize and diversify industry through infrastructure development and targeted financial aid.
reforms.growth_orientation_rationale: By modernizing and diversifying industry, the PEDIP programme enhances competitiveness and encourages innovation, which can lead to increased productivity and economic growth.
reforms.status_evidence: The PEDIP programme has been in operation and has approved a significant number of projects.
reforms.importance_rationale: The PEDIP programme represents a significant structural initiative aimed at enhancing industrial competitiveness and innovation capacity, with broad implications for the economy.
reforms.source_quote: The PEDIP is an envelope programme designed to co-ordinate financial aid to industry, channelling funds from various Community and domestic sources to specific projects.
